native_form.query: SELECT "source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START" AS "DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START", "source"."Trial Activity Bucket" AS "Trial Activity Bucket", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."sum" > 0 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct "source"."USER_ID") AS double), 0.0) AS "Watcher %" FROM (SELECT "source"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "source"."sum" AS "sum", "source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START" AS "DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START", CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" >= 4 THEN ? WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 0 THEN ? WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 1 THEN ? WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 2 THEN ? WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 3 THEN ? ELSE ? END AS "Trial Activity Bucket" FROM (SELECT TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START")) AS "DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START", "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" AS "DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD", "source"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", SUM("source"."WATCHED_TIME_SEC") AS "sum" FROM (select * from ANALYTICS_PROD.DBT_VIZ.VIZ_RETENTION_M0_COHORT_BUCKET_MOVEMENT) AS "source" GROUP BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START")), "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD", "source"."USER_ID" ORDER BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START")) ASC, "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" ASC, "source"."USER_ID" ASC) AS "source") AS "source" GROUP BY "source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START", "source"."Trial Activity Bucket" ORDER BY "source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START" ASC, "source"."Trial Activity Bucket" ASC
